title: EthraPack
description: Optimization of a vanilla+ modpack for version 1.21.x with all necessary tools!
body:
# EthraPack

_This is an assembly that contains optimizing mods, tools for designing various projects in creative mode and simply developing on various SMP and RP projects._

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bdcd2d68fb0b8d31494ed4e2025a5f3a004a108.png)

**Own development of the company PLIERATechnologies.**
